SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ATTY. MICHAEL FLEMING FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-30-2022. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. MICHAEL FLEMING FOR APR-01-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. SANCTIONS MAY BE PAID VIA E-FILING. IF SANCTIONS PAID BEFORE 04/01/22 THEN THE COURT WILL VACATE THE OSC DATE. IF NOT, COUNSEL MAY FILE A DECLARATION AND APPEAR ON APR-01-2022. THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO IN DEPT. 306. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 306 VIA THE E-MAIL ADDRESS PROVIDED AT TRIAL CALL BY 4:00PM TODAY TO SCHEDULE THE MSC. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON MAY-09-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY CLOSED. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K.
